title: Arequipe de Queso con Arepas Venezolanas
description: A delicious Venezuelan dessert made with melted cheese, arepas, and caramelized corn.
instructions: 2. Slice the arepas in half and toast until lightly browned.
3. In a saucepan, caramelize the corn with butter and sugar over medium heat.
4. In a separate saucepan, melt the queso fresco over low heat.
5. Assemble the arepas by spreading a layer of melted cheese on each half.
6. Top the cheese with caramelized corn and a sprinkle of sugar.
7. Place the arepas under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
